params.prompt: I'm new to this site. Give me a quick crash course on the-internet.herokuapp.com: tell me what the site is for, point out 5 sections that are especially useful for browser-agent testing, and briefly explain why each one matters. Open any pages you need, then summarize in a short list.

Use the browser on the-internet.herokuapp.com, not web search. Visit the Checkboxes page, make sure checkbox 1 is checked and checkbox 2 is unchecked, then tell me the final state of both boxes and the exact page heading.

Use the browser on the-internet.herokuapp.com, not web search. Visit the Checkboxes page, make sure checkbox 1 is checked and checkbox 2 is unchecked, then tell me the final state of both boxes and the exact page heading.
